sources.title: Delegated Approval Matrix
sources.description: Spend authority limits by role, entity, and account class.

sources.title: Vendor Master & Onboarding SOP
sources.description: Supplier registration, bank-detail verification, purchase-order matching, and master-data controls.

sources.title: Related-Party Transaction Policy
sources.description: Identification, disclosure, approval, and audit review rules for related-party transactions.

sources.title: Travel & Expense Reimbursement Policy
sources.description: Benchmarking, receipt, route, hotel, meal, taxi, and fuel evidence requirements.

sources.title: Expense Recognition SOP
sources.description: Capitalisation thresholds, period recognition, account mapping, and manual journal controls.

sources.title: Segregation of Duties Control Standard
sources.description: Posting, approval, vendor maintenance, payment release, and override separation rules.

sources.title: Sample General Ledger Data Dictionary
sources.description: Column definitions, risk hints, and expected evidence fields for uploaded GL data.

chunks.title: Dual Approval Threshold
chunks.content: Operating expense payments of 25000 USD or more require dual approval by the business owner and a controller. Payments of 50000 USD or more also require engagement partner review before release.

chunks.title: Emergency Spend Exception
chunks.content: Emergency spend may be approved after the fact only when the approver records the business justification, evidence of service delivery, and controller concurrence within five business days.

chunks.title: Supplier Onboarding Evidence
chunks.content: New suppliers require tax registration validation, sanctions screening, bank-account verification, and an approved purchase order before the first invoice is paid.

chunks.title: Vendor Master Change Control
chunks.content: Vendor bank detail changes must be requested by procurement, verified independently by finance operations, and approved by a controller who did not create the change request.

chunks.title: Related-Party Identification
chunks.content: Transactions with vendors sharing common ownership, officers, directors, family relationships, or beneficial owners with company personnel must be flagged for related-party review.

chunks.title: Related-Party Approval
chunks.content: A related-party transaction cannot be auto-cleared. It requires disclosure evidence, independent pricing support, and approval by the audit partner or equivalent governance owner.

chunks.title: Airfare Benchmarking
chunks.content: Flight reimbursement claims must include route, travel date, passenger name, invoice or ticket number, and a third-party fare benchmark. Claims outside 25 percent of benchmark require manual review.

chunks.title: Hotel and Meal Limits
chunks.content: Hotel claims require city, check-in date, check-out date, invoice, and market benchmark support. Meal claims above local per-diem or missing itemized receipt evidence must be reviewed manually.

chunks.title: Taxi and Fuel Evidence
chunks.content: Taxi claims require pickup, drop location, distance or provider receipt, and fare benchmark. Fuel claims require quantity, location, invoice date, and reference fuel price for the service date.

chunks.title: Period Recognition
chunks.content: Consulting and professional-service expenses are recognized in the period services are rendered. Unusual late postings, round-number invoices, or missing service period evidence require follow-up.

chunks.title: Capitalisation Review
chunks.content: Software, equipment, and implementation costs above 50000 USD require assessment against capitalisation criteria. Ambiguous account mapping must be routed to controllership review.

chunks.title: Posting and Approval Separation
chunks.content: The employee who creates or posts a journal entry cannot be the final approver for the same transaction. System, admin, or service-account postings require named business-owner attestation.

chunks.title: Manual Override Review
chunks.content: Manual overrides to approval workflow, vendor validation, payment block, or evidence requirements must be logged with reason code, actor, timestamp, and independent reviewer sign-off.

chunks.title: Ledger Field Expectations
chunks.content: The sample general ledger uses transaction_id, posted_at, vendor_name, category, amount, currency, fx_rate_used, posted_by, approver, purchase_order, invoice_id, and risk_hint fields.

chunks.title: Risk Hint Semantics
chunks.content: Risk hints such as materiality, duplicate, unknown_vendor, off_hours, fx_outlier, and segregation_of_duties are prefilter signals. They are not final conclusions without supporting evidence.
